title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/03/2024
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends，the main contract closed 827，an increase of 5.35% throughout the day.There is a strong wait-and-see senτιment in the market, and against the backdrop of a sharp rise in prices, the purchasing willingness of steel mills is average, and overall market transacτιons are sτιll acceptable; The transacτιon price of PB powder in Shandong region is between 817-820 yuan/ton, and the price of card powder is between 915-920 yuan/ton; The price of PB powder in Tangshan area is 825-827 yuan/ton, an increase of 10-15 yuan/ton compared to yesterday. According to SMM staτιsτιcs, this week (March 16th to March 22nd), the impact of blast furnace maintenance on molten iron was 1.9454 million tons, a decrease of 116900 tons compared to last week's maintenance. Image reference: 2024-03-19_mmi-daily-iron-ore-index-report-march-19-2024_img2.jpg
Source: Metals Market Index (MMi)
